movie.synopsis: The older sister Seon-yeong and the younger sister Ji-yeong, who left the busy city and moved to a remote rural village. The youth president Dae-geun and the village head Bong-sam, who work tirelessly day and night for the village’s happiness and prosperity, fall for the two sisters who add excitement to the quiet village. Not only them, but also a suspicious man who is obsessed with them and a wanted criminal who makes a fuss in the village!
